---
title: "exercise-11"
author: "Janny Mauricio Velasco Alban"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Exercise 11

## Janny Mauricio Velasco Alban

### Practice Model Selection

The objective of this exercise is to run exploratory multivariate regression to evaluate different models.

#### Libraries

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(skimr)
```

#### Dataset

```{r}

f<- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/difiore/ada-datasets/main/Mammal_lifehistories_v2.txt"

d<- read_tsv(f, col_names = TRUE)

view(d)
names(d)

s<- (skim(d))
s
```

After doing the skim analysis of the dataset we obtained that 4 columns were categorical (character) and 10 were numeric. (verify with the skimr results).

#### Challenge

##### Step 1

```{r}


```

##### Step 2

```{r}


```

##### Step 3

```{r}


```

##### Step 4

```{r}


```

##### Step 5

```{r}


```

##### Step 6

```{r}


```
